name: UniswapX Intent-Based Swap
description: Submit a signed swap intent to UniswapX. Solvers compete to fill at the best price across all liquidity sources (CEX, DEX, on-chain inventory). Better fills than direct AMM (0.1-1.5% improvement) and gas-free for the user.
use_case: Agent swaps 100 WETH → USDC. Direct Uniswap V3 = 1.2% slippage on $200k notional. UniswapX = 0.4% slippage (solver hedges cheaper on Binance). Saves ~$1,600 per $200k swap.

verification.criteria: Verifier confirms (a) order was filled on-chain via UniswapX Reactor, (b) effective price beats baseline Uniswap V3 quote at fill block by >= 30 bps.
